title: Better Climbing
description: Improves some things related to climbing
body:
**NOTE: This mod is not intended to be used clientside on vanilla servers. You might get banned by anticheat plugins or whatever**

Features:
- Lets you fall down ladders faster by looking down
- Increases upwards climb speed
- Up/down climbing speed gradually increases over 3 seconds
- Prevents the "bump" you sometimes get when walking into a ladder shaft to climb down
- Makes you not slow down when walking through a climbable block (including blocks like vines)
- Makes you able to jump while standing in a climbable block
